title: pseudarthria hookeri var. confertiflora
intro: Pseudarthria hookeri var. confertiflora is a plant species within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the sensitive plant due to its sensitive leaves that fold up when touched. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pseudarthria hookeri var. confertiflora include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
